name: Space Shooter XR
description: Embark on an exhilarating journey through the cosmos in Space Shooter-XR! Prepare for an adrenaline-pumping experience as you pilot your spacecraft through stunning intergalactic environments filled with relentless enemies and epic battles.
instructions: Movement Use the UP arrow key to move the spaceship forward Use the DOWN arrow key to move the spaceship backward Use the LEFT arrow key to steer the spaceship left Use the RIGHT arrow key to steer the spaceship right Shooting Press the left mouse b
